column1: 顏面燒燙傷合併五官功能障礙：
眼及其附屬器官之燒傷
column2: Burn confined to eye and adnexa

column1:
臉及頭之燒傷，深部組織壞死
（深三度），伴有身體部位損害
column2:
Burn of face and head, deep necrosis of underlying tissues
(deep third degree) with loss of a body part

column1: 燒燙傷面積達全身百分之二十以上：

column2: Burn of 90% or more of body surface
